description: Nekath Gedara Tikiri Banda and Another Vs.Sri Lanka Mahaweli Authority and Others Nekath Gedara Tikiri Banda and Another Vs.Sri Lanka Mahaweli Authority and Others View More before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Nekath Gedara Tikiri Banda and Another Vs.Sri Lanka Mahaweli Authority and Others Nekath Gedara Tikiri Banda and Another Vs.Sri Lanka Mahaweli Authority and Others View More
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The two Petitioners are the eldest children of one grantee who had nominated another child (the 7th Respondent) under a permit issued in respect of the same land in suit prior to the grant. No nomination was made under the grant. Later, having intended to cancel the original nomination, is said to have effected the cancellation and made a new nomination which had not been communicated to the relevant authorities to accept and register the same. Held – original nomination survives; Application of the Petitioners seeking to quash the decision to accept the 7th Respondent as the successor to the rights of the grantee is dismissed.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
